---
title: "Black Pine (Pinus nigra)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Pinaceae](/trees/family/pinaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Pinus*](/trees/genus/pinus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 123 - Black Pine](../123.html) | SK: Darwin Centre Courtyard |
| [Tree 153 - Black Pine](../153.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Tree 163 - Black Pine](../163.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Tree 174 - Black Pine](../174.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Tree 178 - Black Pine](../178.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
